visual_description: A young boy with light-colored hair, wearing a gray shirt, is shown in close-up, his face and hands visibly wet, as he holds and examines an object in his hands. His gaze is directed downward at the object, and his facial expression appears focused, with his mouth slightly open. The background is dark and indistinct, drawing attention to the boy and his actions.
